page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at a base frequency of 2.25 GHz. With 1.0 thread per core, each vCPU operates on a dedicated physical core without hyperthreading, ensuring consistent compute performance.

The instance is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, requiring external block storage for operating system and application data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 4 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Operating as a general-purpose instance, the ecs.g9ae.xlarge offers a balanced resource profile for workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. The dedicated core allocation ensures predictable CPU performance, making it suitable for web serving, application hosting, microservices, and light database workloads. The lack of local storage and public IPv4 addresses represents a tradeoff that requires users to provision cloud storage and network routing separately.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual server instance built on the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 4 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at 2.25 GHz, featuring a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration that ensures dedicated physical execution resources. The instance provides 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage for data persistence. Network performance is defined by a baseline bandwidth of 4 Gbps, with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This configuration is designed for workloads requiring predictable CPU performance without the need for high-speed local disk I/O or hardware acceleration, such as mid-tier web servers, containerized microservices, and general-purpose application hosting.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance featuring 4 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T95 vCPUs at 2.25 GHz, 16.0 GB RAM, 4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, and no local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance with 4 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 4 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC virtual server offering balanced compute and memory resources with predictable physical core performance.
bullet_points: Four dedicated AMD EPYC 9T95 vCPUs with one thread per core
16.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per physical core
No local storage or integrated GPU resources
Suitable for general-purpose application hosting and microservices
